recent_form_summary: First ATP 500+ final of his career: beat Fery 7-6(1) 3-6 6-4 in the QF and Nakashima 6-7(5) 6-3 6-4 in a 3-set SF thriller.
stat_trend_summary: Totaled 14 aces across three matches this week (~4.7/match average), comfortably above the 3.5 line, though only tournament aggregates were confirmed, not a per-match breakdown.
opponent_factor_summary: Paul is a solid but not lockdown grass returner; Cerundolo has out-served opponents averaging nearly 5 aces/match this week regardless of opponent quality.
injury_news: Took an accidental ball strike to the throat vs Fery in the QF, described as resolved after 1-2 games with no lingering effect.
notes: Aggregate ace data (14 aces / 4.7 per match) clears the 3.5 line comfortably, but lack of individual match-by-match breakdown and a minor recent knock keep confidence at medium.
